title: [release-1.18] Fix CVE-2025-27144, bump Skopeo to v1.18.1
body:
This addresses CVE-2025-27144 by bumping github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v3
to v3.0.4 and github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v4 to v4.0.5

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-52933,
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-82972, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-82961
